source: pre-existing repository violentmonkey.env decoded during metadata migration, corrected against the published release bundle
sourceFormat: base64-encoded env file plus published background/index.js literals
reason: Violentmonkey release workflow injects SYNC_* values into the build environment, and writes them to .env only for the release source zip.
publicness: These values are treated as public release inputs because they are recoverable from the published extension.

corrections.source: published AMO and GitHub release background/index.js
